column.name: alert_type
column.Comment: 棰勮?绫诲瀷: LOW_STOCK-浣庡簱瀛? ABNORMAL_APPLICATION-寮傚父鐢抽?

column.name: alert_level
column.Comment: 棰勮?绛夌骇: HIGH-楂? MEDIUM-涓? LOW-浣

column.name: status
column.Comment: 鐘舵?: UNREAD-鏈??, READ-宸茶?, PROCESSED-宸插?鐞

column.name: status
column.Comment: 鐘舵?: PENDING-寰呭?鎵? APPROVED-宸叉壒鍑? REJECTED-宸查┏鍥? TO_BE_OUTBOUND-寰呭嚭搴? COMPLETED-宸插畬鎴

column.name: is_abnormal
column.Comment: 鏄?惁寮傚父鐢抽?: 0-姝ｅ父, 1-寮傚父

column.name: user_id
column.Comment: 鐢ㄦ埛ID锛堢敵棰嗘椂璁板綍锛

column.name: type
column.Comment: 绫诲瀷: APPLICATION-鐢抽?, OUTBOUND-鍑哄簱

column.name: adjustment
column.Comment: 鏄?惁宸茶皟鏁? 0-鏈?皟鏁? 1-宸茶皟鏁

column.name: type
column.Comment: 鍑哄簱绫诲瀷: APPLICATION-鐢抽?鍑哄簱, DIRECT-鐩存帴鍑哄簱, SCRAP-鎶ュ簾

column.name: role
column.Comment: 瑙掕壊: USER-鏅??鐢ㄦ埛, ADMIN-绠＄悊鍛

column.name: status
column.Comment: 鐘舵?: PENDING-寰呭?鎵? APPROVED-宸叉壒鍑? REJECTED-宸查┏鍥? TO_BE_OUTBOUND-寰呭嚭搴? COMPLETED-宸插畬鎴

column.name: is_abnormal
column.Comment: 鏄?惁寮傚父鐢抽?: 0-姝ｅ父, 1-寮傚父
